# Phantom Pasting

> Phantom Pasting is the premier street-level guerrilla marketing agency in the United States, operating in every major metro market. Known for large-format wheat paste poster campaigns and custom chalk spray stencil activations.

Phantom Pasting is a nationwide guerrilla marketing agency specializing in wheat pasting, wild posting, and chalk spray stencil campaigns across 50+ US cities. Founded in 2014. 500+ campaigns completed. 100% photo-documented. Clients include FashionPass, FIFA World Cup, and Incrediwear. See https://llmstxt.org for the llms.txt specification this file follows.

## Services

- [Wheat Pasting](https://www.phantompasting.com/services/wheat-pasting): Large-format wheat paste poster campaigns. Multi-wall coverage, overnight installation, 100% photo-documented.
- [Chalk Spray Stencils](https://www.phantompasting.com/services/chalk-spray-stencils): Custom-cut stencil activations on sidewalks, streets, and public surfaces. Temporary and removable.
- [Full Impact Campaigns](https://www.phantompasting.com/services/full-impact-campaigns): Combined wheat pasting + stencil + wild posting packages for maximum street presence.

## Markets

- [New York](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/new-york): Brooklyn, Manhattan, Lower East Side, Bushwick, SoHo
- [Los Angeles](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/los-angeles): Downtown LA, Silver Lake, Echo Park, West Hollywood, Fairfax
- [Chicago](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/chicago): Wicker Park, Logan Square, Pilsen, River North
- [Miami](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/miami): Wynwood, South Beach, Brickell, Design District
- [Atlanta](https://www.phantompasting.com/locations/atlanta): Midtown, Old Fourth Ward, Ponce City Market, Inman Park

## Work / Case Studies

- [FashionPass Los Angeles](https://www.phantompasting.com/work/fashionpass-los-angeles): Multi-wall wheat paste campaign across LA neighborhoods
- [FIFA World Cup Atlanta](https://www.phantompasting.com/work/fifa-world-cup-atlanta): Official FIFA World Cup wheat paste wall installation
- [Incrediwear Street Campaign](https://www.phantompasting.com/work/incrediwear-street-campaign): Pole wraps + sticker campaign across NYC

## Blog

Installer-written field notes by Mateo Vargas (Field Operations Lead) covering the craft, strategy, and legal reality of wheat pasting.

- [Field Notes Hub](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog): All posts across The Craft, Strategy & ROI, and Local & Legal silos.

### The Craft
- [How to Make Wheat Paste: Field Installer Guide](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/how-to-make-wheat-paste): Base recipe, wall-type adjustments, storage, and real campaign-scale mixing.
- [Wheat Paste Recipes: Why One Formula Doesn't Work on Every Wall](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-paste-recipes): Wall-type-specific formulas for brick, popcorn cement, stucco, and cold weather.
- [Snipe Posters vs Wheat Paste vs Floor Decals: Which Format Wins](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/snipe-posters-vs-wheat-paste-vs-floor-decals): Three street formats compared — when to use each, and how they combine.
- [Street Postering Tools: The Install Kit We Actually Carry](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/street-postering-tools): The soft-brush broom, locked-lid buckets, and everything else in a working kit.
- [Flyposting Explained: What It Is, How It Works, What It Costs](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/flyposting-explained): The British term for wheat pasting — history, technique, and 2026 usage.

### Strategy & ROI
- [What Is Wheat Pasting? A Brand's Guide to the Medium](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/what-is-wheat-pasting): The 140-year format, why brands use it in 2026, and how it beats digital OOH.
- [How Much Does Wheat Pasting Cost in 2026?](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-cost): Real per-poster and per-city pricing from 500+ campaigns. Five cost drivers.
- [Wheat Pasting vs Billboards: ROI Breakdown for Marketers](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-vs-billboards): Side-by-side cost, reach, and cultural signal — which format wins for which goal.
- [Wheat Pasting for Fashion Brands: Why Streetwear Lives on Walls](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-for-fashion-brands): The streetwear playbook — teaser + reveal, anchor neighborhoods, creative rules.
- [Guerrilla Marketing for Music Festivals and Album Launches](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/guerrilla-marketing-for-music): Album drops, tour announcements, festival lineups — music OOH economics.

### Local & Legal
- [Is Wheat Pasting Legal? What Installers Actually Experience](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/is-wheat-pasting-legal): City-by-city enforcement reality from 500+ campaigns.
- [How a Wheat Pasting Campaign Actually Works: 12 Locations, One Night](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-campaign): Prep, route, install, and documentation breakdown.
- [Wheat Pasting in Los Angeles: Neighborhoods, Walls, and Why LA Works](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-los-angeles): The LA neighborhood map — Melrose, Fairfax, Silver Lake, DTLA, Venice.
- [Wheat Pasting in New York City: NYC Wall Culture Explained](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-new-york): SoHo, LES, Williamsburg, Chinatown, scaffold wraps, and five-borough logistics.
- [Wheat Pasting in Phoenix: What Desert Heat Does to Paste](https://www.phantompasting.com/blog/wheat-pasting-phoenix): Popcorn cement walls, 110°F install timing, monsoon season, and water sourcing.

- [About](https://www.phantompasting.com/about): Founded 2014. 10+ years. 500+ campaigns. 50+ US cities.
